src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.general_idea: Introduce a new LineBrush subclass to draw straight line segments.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.human_impl: public static class LineBrush extends Brush { ... gc.strokeLine(x - size / 2, y, x + size / 2, y); }

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.general_idea: Introduce a new TriangleBrush subclass to draw equilateral triangles.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.human_impl: public static class TriangleBrush extends Brush { ... gc.fillPolygon(xs, ys, 3); }

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.general_idea: Introduce a new StarBrush subclass to draw 5-pointed stars.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Brush.java.human_impl: public static class StarBrush extends Brush { ... gc.fillPolygon(xs, ys, 10); }

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Replaced the custom rectangle-based color palette with a standard JavaFX ColorPicker for better UX and maintainability.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..human_impl: Removed `createColorPalette` and `HBox colorPalette`; added `ColorPicker colorPicker` and its value change listener.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Implemented a comprehensive text editing mode allowing users to add, edit, move, and style text boxes on the canvas.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..human_impl: Added `TextBox` management, `textMode` flag, keyboard event handlers, and UI controls for font family, size, bold, and italic.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Implemented undo and redo capabilities for both drawing actions (via canvas snapshots) and text modifications.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..human_impl: Added `Stack<Image>` for brush states and `Stack<List<TextBox>>` for text states, along with `handleUndo` and `handleRedo` methods.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Extended the available brush types to include Line, Triangle, and Star shapes.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..human_impl: Added cases for "Line", "Triangle", and "Star" in the `updateBrush` switch statement.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Refactored mouse event handlers to support both drawing and text interaction modes (dragging, selecting, editing).
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..human_impl: Updated `handleMousePressed`, `handleMouseDragged`, and `handleMouseReleased` to check `textMode` and delegate to text-specific logic.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..general_idea: Implemented a `redrawCanvas` method to composite the background image snapshot with the current list of text boxes.
src/main/java/org/main/paint/Controller..human_impl: Added `redrawCanvas` which clears the canvas, draws the latest undo stack image, and iterates through `textBoxes` to render them.

src/main/java/org/main/paint/Main.java.general_idea: Increased the default window dimensions of the JavaFX application.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
Add the missing javafx-graphics dependency required for JavaFX applications.
Update the org.json library to a newer version.
Add maven-jar-plugin to configure the JAR manifest with classpath and main class.
Add maven-shade-plugin to create an executable uber-jar with the main class.
Rename the jlink image name from 'paint' to 'paint-app'.
Update the main class reference in the JavaFX plugin to point to the new Launcher class.

src/main/resources/org/main/paint/paint..general_idea: Replaced the programmatic color palette HBox with a standard JavaFX ColorPicker control.
Added UI buttons for undo and redo functionality with associated action handlers.
Added a checkbox to toggle text input mode in the paint application.
Added a container with text input, font selection, size, and style controls for text mode.
Increased the dimensions of the drawing canvas and added alignment properties.
Added an fx:id to the StackPane container holding the canvas for programmatic access.

src/main/resources/org/main/paint/styles.general_idea: Added CSS styling to visually indicate when buttons are disabled.
Commented out existing color rectangle styles, likely due to UI refactoring or removal of that component.
Added CSS styling for text input fields to match the application's design language.
Added CSS styling for check boxes, including selected state colors.
